input[type=\"checkbox\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(138, 92, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(30, 30, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
